title: H_008 = K1 CLOSE тАФ band too narrow (cliff not knee); campaign's last reopen door shut BY MEASUREMENT G-1.5b band-existence pre-run, both seeds, instrumented (validity 1.0, plateau clean): k*=96 is textbook in-band (s0 0.651 / s1 0.6875, cross-seed 0.0365) but the factor-2 neighbor k=48 is reproducibly below the 0.60 floor (s0 0.5365 / s1 0.5417, |delta|=0.0052) -> the pre-registered four-point clause fails -> K1 CLOSE. The control's sample-efficiency curve is a CLIFF not a knee: it crosses the whole band between k=48 (0.54) and k=192 (0.92) with only k=96 inside; a one-budget band cannot anchor F1. Pre-registered bans honored: no midpoint drill, no third seed, no non-validity rerun; the re-instrumented k=96 reads REPLACED phase-a's 0.7448->0.651 (replacement-not-selection, worse kept). The A-tug mechanism arm NEVER RAN. Fable's $0 prediction ('k=48 is the honest modal K1') landed, measured lower than its 0.596 interpolation. Consequence: anima-v4's ONE non-twin reopen door is shut by measurement, not argument; the campaign stays CONCLUDED on mech-1 (write-side FIELD-FORMAT causal, thesis PARTIAL). Reopen needs a scaled successor with a knee-shaped curve.

H_008 G-1.5 $0 prep + freeze draft complete (lab-full design), blocked on memory lab-full design analysis (Fable decisive, Codex trace-only, claims code-verified): k=384=tail-of-run transient (non-load-bearing, flagged); four-point clause forces k=48 (built, B48 hash 1a50a0b85d6b); train_g1_5 instrumented (plateau + validity guards); fixed run-list C-dup{k48,k96}x2 + C-scaf/C-shuf@k96x2 (cap 8->10 hygiene, replacement-not-selection); seed-1 salvaged provisional (k96 s1 0.6667 in-band). Freeze draft recorded on card + ng.h008: k*=96 neighbor 48, F1 Delta>=0.10 both, per-seed E, headroom>=0.20, band/plateau/F2 truth, phase-c <=0.80 -> K1b, K-scope. All $0 (c790afd). Executes on memory recovery -> freeze or K1/K1b. Campaign CONCLUDED on mech-1 meanwhile.

H_008 SWAP-XOR-C VALIDATED: parity trap fixed, sample-efficiency curve, band k*=96 G-1.5a-C (seed 0, instrumented) on the corrected panel: C-dup in_sample=1.0 at k<=192 (control MEMORIZES тАФ SWAP-XOR-B was stuck at 0.5, parity trap gone via A7') with a genuine sample-efficiency curve f2 0.5417(k24)->0.7448(k96)->0.9167(k192). Band candidate k*=96 (f2 0.74 in [0.60,0.80]). k=192 saturates; k=384 anomaly (in_sample 0.638 + higher ceA тАФ full-budget optimization instability, single-seed, flagged). Corrected gate met (reachability by in-sample fit not held-out level). Convergence audit-wrong-property-parity-1 recorded (a closed-form audit testing the wrong property forced a parity-trap construction that passed all-green yet was unlearnable). Next: G-1.5b seed 1 cross-seed stability + resolve k=384 anomaly -> G-1.5c pricing -> freeze.

H_008 G-1.5a = K1-VOID-FOR-CAUSE: SWAP-XOR-B parity-trap defect (mis-specified A7) тАФ rebuild SWAP-XOR-C lab-full adjudication (Fable decisive; Codex trace-only): C-dup at chance all budgets incl k=384 (0.5156) тАФ opposite of H_007 saturation, so the band E-anchor was refuted and the gate is inadmissible (not a clean CLOSE). Verified root cause: build_swap_xor_b.py deviated from seed ┬з3.1 (48 distinct syllables/arbitrary class) to 24 paired syllables to pass A7-as-implemented (syllableтЖТclass 0.500, arithmetically incompatible with 48-distinct), making class a 2-syllable parity conjunction тЖТ 3-way parity with gold, SGD-hard. Fix = SWAP-XOR-C (48 distinct non-corpus syllables, arbitrary per-lexeme class; A7' = no cross-lexeme syllable sharing + no CPT). Corrected gate: reachability by in-sample budget-fit d_acc(B(k))>=0.95 not held-out control level. Next: rebuild тЖТ re-run G-0b тЖТ G-1.5a instrumented. Campaign stays CONCLUDED until corrected pre-run.

H_008 G-1.5a: control at FLOOR not ceiling тАФ K1-literal but under verdict-integrity review G-1.5a measured C-dup (forward control) f2_dacc on SWAP-XOR-B at chance for ALL budgets: k=24тЖТ0.5104, k=96тЖТ0.50, k=192тЖТ0.4948, k=384(full)тЖТ0.5156. The collector stamped K1 CLOSE (no budget in [0.60,0.80]) but the control is at the FLOOR, the OPPOSITE of the H_007 saturation the band guarded against. Likely cause: byte-orthogonal synthetic non-corpus pools (which closed H_007's class side channel) over-corrected into ungroundedness (Fable ┬з7 'ungrounded-for-all-arms' risk) тАФ the from-scratch d=384 trunk cannot learn 24 arbitrary synthetic lexemeтЖТclass + compose. Per verdict-integrity, NOT stamping CLOSE: the band gate conflates 'reachable' with 'sub-ceiling' and cannot tell 'ungrounded for all arms' from 'hard for the forward control specifically' (which is the mechanism's whole premise). Delegated the adjudication to lab full (Fable+Codex): mis-framed gate vs genuine CLOSE + cheapest disambiguating measurement + panel fix (productive byte-length-preserving class cue?).

H_008 lit-verify + G-0b CLEARED тАФ SWAP-XOR-B 16/16 audits pass, side channel closed build_swap_xor_b.py: 24 byte-orthogonal synthetic lexemes (rare Hangul, NSMC-absent) + coverage-complete drill n=384 (f2-subjectsтКЖdrill) + f2 n=192 + nested budget constructor B(24/96/192/384). ALL 16 audits PASS: A1-A6 (H_007 suite re-run) + A7 class-byte-orthogonality 0.500 exact (closes the ┬з0.5 budget-independent side channel that voided H_007) + B1-B6 budget audits. First build failed B2/B3 (budget prefix all marker0/SOV тЖТ gold unidentifiable); root-caused to the naive first-r-per-subject selector, fixed with class-local phase-rotated ordering so every budget prefix is cell-balanced. lit-verify: load-bearing premise carried-verified from H_007; 2 new MEMORY rows (Rasmus 2015 ladder, Power 2022 grokking) foundational/non-critical, arXiv rate-limited=infra. Freeze still blocked on G-1.5a/b/c band-existence controls-first pre-run (~1.5h ea).

NOT killed: (i) P-conflict role-specific, differential cos-grad vs C-dup +0.2716 (A-tug conflicted then resolves late; C-dup heads converge) тАФ the absolute cos was confounded by the two separate readout heads (C-dup showed cos=A-tug at init), so the instrument was corrected to the differential vs C-dup; (ii) faithful f2 forced-choice d_acc A-tug 0.5677 > C-dup 0.4948, sep +0.0729. FIX (Fable option i, $0): dacc_panel scores only field-carried FREE slots {0,1,2,4} computed from the codebook; C-perm re-scores 0.643тЖТ0.465 (chance). bar3 corrected two-sided + held-out f2тА│ + parity confirmation. H_004 bar3 probe: leak reaches held-out (d=64 confound) bar3_probe.py (d=64 discriminator) FLIPPED the benign prior: C-perm held-out f2тА│=0.6615 (out of harness band [0.45,0.55]), A-duel held-out f2тА│=1.0. Missing decisive cell = C-perm f2тА│ at d=384 boosted. Fable-5 adjudicating; full 5-arm run held until the harness is clean.
